_note: SYNTHETIC DATA — not from a real system. Represents output of Get-RecentLogErrors -LogName System -MaxEvents 8 piped to Export-SafeOpsReport -Format JSON.
schema: Get-RecentLogErrors / Get-LogEventsById output shape: TimeCreated, Id, ProviderName, LevelDisplayName, Message
